name: edloidas-workflow
description: A Codex-safe workflow bundle for instruction-file sync, issue drafting and triage, release prep, commit summaries, label management, and Git worktree management.

interface.shortDescription: Instruction sync, issue flow, releases, labels, and worktrees.
interface.longDescription: Install lightweight Git and GitHub workflow helpers from edloidas/skills for syncing repo instruction files, drafting and prioritizing issues, validating npm releases, summarizing commits, managing labels, and working across multiple worktrees.
